items.title: Peak Season Reliability discovery
items.name: Peak Season Reliability discovery
items.summary: Operational discovery tracking where seasonal demand puts booking, reservation, and payment flows most at risk.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which protective rollouts and rate limits are required before peak summer volume.

items.title: Trust and Support Readiness discovery
items.name: Trust and Support Readiness discovery
items.summary: Operational discovery reviewing whether trust and recovery operations are prepared for higher homes and mixed-payment volume.
items.decisionToMake: Decide where trust and support workflows need added automation or staffing before peak season.
